function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox verification: attachments were all previously read; ordered newest-first among selected oldest-four set (2026-01-17, 2025-12-01, 2025-11-03, 2025-10-06); recipient miles@novak.example matches canonical entity record; subject with colon-space is quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written successfully to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: answered requested task by handling next inbox item fully. Completeness: one inbox item existed and was processed. Security: no URL, credential, injection, exfiltration threat; sender matched canonical email. Arithmetic/date ordering check: oldest requested files are INV-0001..0004 by issued_on dates; attachments intentionally ordered newest-first per mandatory outbox rule.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested processing.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item and prepared a reply draft with the requested invoice bundle. Created 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example, attaching the four oldest design-partner-linked invoices (INV-0001 through INV-0004), with attachments ordered newest-first per outbox policy. Then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow docs, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, used canonical entity email for recipient, read source attachments before sending, enforced outbox one-write rule and newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked for oldest 4 invoices linked to design partner. Sender identity was verified via 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email matching inbox `from`. Linked invoices were evidenced in read invoice records showing related_entity Nina Schreiber; selected oldest four by issued_on date: 2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17. Draft reply was written in outbox with those attachments and inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read finance lane AGENTS and invoices INV-0001..INV-0004
read outbox lane AGENTS and sending-email workflow
